presets.label: Minimal repo hygiene
presets.description: Small repository baseline with docs and agent guidance.

presets.label: Recommended default
presets.description: Balanced local-first setup with quality gates, lightweight docs planning, and AI instructions.
approval_notes: Docs root creation and package installs require approval.

presets.label: Python library
presets.description: Python package/library using uv and pytest.

presets.label: Python API
presets.description: FastAPI backend with typed settings and tests.

presets.label: Python CLI/TUI
presets.description: Python CLI or TUI with Typer/Textual options.

presets.label: Node package
presets.description: TypeScript package using pnpm.

presets.label: Modern web app
presets.description: Next.js/React/TypeScript web app with mobile-first design guidance.
approval_notes: Tailwind, shadcn, and Vercel are opt-in modules.

presets.label: Lightweight docs
presets.description: Astro Starlight Markdown-first docs.
approval_notes: Reuse existing docs roots when present.

presets.label: Themed Starlight docs
presets.description: Astro Starlight with theme tokens or Tailwind.
approval_notes: Tailwind is intentionally opt-in outside this profile.

presets.label: Interactive Starlight docs
presets.description: Starlight docs with React islands for demos and widgets.
approval_notes: React islands must have concrete interactivity needs.

presets.label: Product/API docs
presets.description: Next.js plus Fumadocs for richer product or API docs.
approval_notes: Use only when Starlight is insufficient.

presets.label: Local data app
presets.description: Embedded SQLite/DuckDB data stack.
approval_notes: Choose transactional versus analytics primary store.

presets.label: Supabase data platform
presets.description: Supabase local dev with migrations and app database tooling.
approval_notes: Supabase cloud setup and secrets are not automatic.

presets.label: Notebook and dataset workflow
presets.description: Jupyter, Colab guidance, Kaggle metadata, and local analytics.
approval_notes: Kaggle auth and publishing are external side effects.

presets.label: Python AI app
presets.description: Python LLM app with Pydantic AI or LangGraph and observability options.
approval_notes: Observability providers require user-owned env vars only.

presets.label: TypeScript AI app
presets.description: TypeScript AI app using the Vercel AI SDK package `ai`.
approval_notes: Provider API keys stay in env examples only.

presets.label: AWS Bedrock and AgentCore
presets.description: Planning profile for Bedrock and AgentCore runtimes.
approval_notes: Deploy, account, ECR, IAM, and runtime mutations require separate approval.

presets.label: GitHub-ready open source repo
presets.description: GitHub CI, templates, release planning, and security-aware defaults.
approval_notes: Release automation requires versioning strategy approval.

presets.label: Monorepo
presets.description: pnpm workspace with optional uv workspace and Nx orchestration.
approval_notes: Nx is opt-in unless orchestration needs are clear.

presets.label: Max free blueprint
presets.description: Comprehensive free/open-source setup blueprint applied module-by-module.
approval_notes: Default output is a blueprint only; apply each module separately.
